invitations.title: School Invitation
invitations.description: An invitation for a school to join the platform.

invitedBy.description: UID of the super admin who sent the invite.

acceptedBy.description: UID of the user who accepted the invite.

defaultGradingScaleId.description: The ID of the default grading scale for the organization.

users.title: User
users.description: A user of the platform (admin, teacher, student, parent).

organizationId.description: The ID of the organization this user belongs to.

student_profiles.title: Student Profile
student_profiles.description: Extended profile information for a student.

student_guardians.title: Student Guardian
student_guardians.description: A parent or guardian of a student.

student_documents.title: Student Document
student_documents.description: A document uploaded for a student.

student_tags.title: Student Tag
student_tags.description: A tag associated with a student.

teacher_profiles.title: Teacher Profile
teacher_profiles.description: Extended profile information for a teacher.

teacher_workload.title: Teacher Workload
teacher_workload.description: Current workload assignment for a teacher.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.description: Attendance record for a student in a class.

ai_grading_jobs.title: AI Grading Job
ai_grading_jobs.description: A job for AI-powered grading of student submissions.

academic_years.title: Academic Year
academic_years.description: An academic year for an organization.

grading_scales.title: Grading Scale
grading_scales.description: A grading scale for an organization.

class_sections.title: Class Section
class_sections.description: A specific section of a class.

class_students.title: Class Student
class_students.description: A student enrolled in a class section.

class_teachers.title: Class Teacher
class_teachers.description: A teacher assigned to a class section.

classrooms.title: Classroom
classrooms.description: A physical classroom or learning space.

classroom_resources.title: Classroom Resource
classroom_resources.description: A resource or equipment assigned to a classroom.

timetable_templates.title: Timetable Template
timetable_templates.description: A template defining the structure of a timetable.

timetable_rules.title: Timetable Rule
timetable_rules.description: A rule or constraint for timetable generation.

timetable_slots.title: Timetable Slot
timetable_slots.description: A specific time slot within a timetable template.

timetable_entries.title: Timetable Entry
timetable_entries.description: A specific assignment of a class to a slot in a timetable.

timetable_conflicts.title: Timetable Conflict
timetable_conflicts.description: A conflict detected within a timetable.

timetable_versions.title: Timetable Version
timetable_versions.description: A versioned snapshot of a timetable.

attendance_sessions.title: Attendance Session
attendance_sessions.description: A specific session for which attendance is recorded.

attendance_records.title: Attendance Record
attendance_records.description: A record of a student's attendance for a session.

attendance_exceptions.title: Attendance Exception
attendance_exceptions.description: An approved absence or exception for a student.

daily_attendance.title: Daily Attendance
daily_attendance.description: General daily attendance for a class section.

exam_sessions.title: Exam Session
exam_sessions.description: A session grouping multiple exams (e.g., First Term Exams).

exam_subjects.title: Exam Subject
exam_subjects.description: A subject within an exam session for a specific class.

exam_results.title: Exam Result
exam_results.description: A student's result for a specific exam subject.

exam_grading_rules.title: Exam Grading Rule
exam_grading_rules.description: Rules for calculating grades based on scores.

report_cards.title: Report Card
report_cards.description: A student's final report card for an exam session.

report_card_comments.title: Report Card Comment
report_card_comments.description: Comments on a student's report card.

ai_grading_feedback.title: AI Grading Feedback
ai_grading_feedback.description: Human feedback on AI grading results.

ai_grading_model_versions.title: AI Grading Model Version
ai_grading_model_versions.description: Versions of the AI model used for grading.

assignments.title: Assignment
assignments.description: An assignment given to a class section.

assignment_submissions.title: Assignment Submission
assignment_submissions.description: A student's submission for an assignment.

assignment_grades.title: Assignment Grade
assignment_grades.description: A grade for an assignment submission.

student_identity_cards.title: Student Identity Card
student_identity_cards.description: Information about a student's physical identity card.

cardId.description: The printed ID on the card.

qrToken.description: Secure token encoded in the QR code.

platform_settings.title: Platform Settings
platform_settings.description: Global configuration for the entire platform.

attendance_anomalies.title: Attendance Anomaly
attendance_anomalies.description: Records suspicious attendance patterns detected by AI

library_books.title: Library Book
library_books.description: Book record in the school library

library_borrows.title: Library Borrow
library_borrows.description: Record of a book borrowed by a student or teacher

transport_assignments.title: Transport Assignment
transport_assignments.description: Assignment of a student to a transport route

discipline_actions.title: Discipline Action
discipline_actions.description: Action taken for a discipline case

behavior_reports.title: Behavior Report
behavior_reports.description: General behavior report for a student

behavior_points.title: Behavior Points
behavior_points.description: Points awarded or deducted for behavior

messages.title: Message
messages.description: A message in the communication module

fee_items.title: Fee Item
fee_items.description: Individual item in a fee structure

support_tickets.title: Support Ticket
support_tickets.description: A support request from a user.

reminders.title: Reminder
reminders.description: A reminder for a user about an announcement or event.

lesson_notes.title: Lesson Note
lesson_notes.description: A lesson note prepared by a teacher for a subject.

approvedBy.description: UID of the HOD who approved the note.

class_master_assignments.title: Class Master Assignment
class_master_assignments.description: Assignment of a teacher as a class master for a specific section.

invigilator_assignments.title: Invigilator Assignment
invigilator_assignments.description: Assignment of a teacher as an invigilator for an exam.

subjects.title: Subject
subjects.description: A subject taught in the school.

class_subjects.title: Class Subject
class_subjects.description: Assignment of a subject and teacher to a class section.

teacher_tasks.title: Teacher Task
teacher_tasks.description: A task for a teacher to manage their workload.

announcement_reminders.title: Announcement Reminder
announcement_reminders.description: A reminder set by a user for an announcement.
